# Sherpa

> Behavioral governance for agentic workflows — and the guides who know how to use it.

Sherpa is an open-source governance framework for AI agent workflows, paired with a consulting practice that uses the same tools on every engagement.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://sherpa.solar
- Framework overview: https://sherpa.solar/framework
- Getting started: https://sherpa.solar/framework/docs
- Consulting services: https://sherpa.solar/consulting
- Our approach: https://sherpa.solar/consulting/approach
- Case studies: https://sherpa.solar/work
- Content hub: https://sherpa.solar/learn
- About: https://sherpa.solar/about
- Contact: https://sherpa.solar/contact

## What Sherpa does

- Defines behavioral constraints for AI agents (not identity prompts)
- Tracks initiatives through a filesystem-based lifecycle
- Ships governance with the code, not in a separate system
- Provides executable conventions as skills and rules

## Who it's for

- Technical leaders evaluating agentic workflows
- Organizations adopting AI who want governance built in
- Developers and AI engineers who want better agent tooling
